## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do? 1-3 bullet points. -->

-

## Type of change

- [ ] `feat` — new feature or endpoint
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `refactor` — code change that doesn't add features or fix bugs
- [ ] `build` — build system / dependency update
- [ ] `ci` — CI/CD pipeline changes
- [ ] `test` — tests only
- [ ] `perf` — performance improvement

## Test plan

- [ ] Integration / unit tests added or updated
- [ ] All tests pass locally (`dotnet test`)
- [ ] No regressions in related modules

## Checklist

- [ ] PR title follows Conventional Commits (`type(scope): description`)
- [ ] No secrets committed (`gitleaks protect --staged` ran clean)
- [ ] EF migrations up to date (no pending model changes)
- [ ] CODEOWNERS notified (auto-assigned on open)
- [ ] Docs updated if public contract changed (endpoints, events, schemas)
